name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Auto title lender in Memphis, TN offering $100–$50,000 same-day loans. Bad credit and past bankruptcies accepted; borrower keeps vehicle during repayment.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a single branch at 1473 S Trezevant St, Memphis, TN 38114, serving as a car-title lender for consumers who have been turned away by traditional financial institutions. The company markets through the domain cartitleloansla.com despite operating in Tennessee, suggesting it may be part of a multi-state network. It positions itself around accessibility, with the tagline 'Sign up by noon, get cash today!' and an explicit welcome to borrowers with bad credit or prior bankruptcies.

The company offers auto-secured lending in two tiers: $100–$2,000 for short-term emergency cash needs, and $2,000–$50,000 for larger expenses. Borrowers pledge their vehicle title as collateral but retain use of the car throughout the repayment period. The stated process is straightforward: apply online, receive same-day cash, repay the loan, and retrieve the title. The Memphis branch operates Monday through Friday 9am–7pm and Saturday 10am–5pm, with no Sunday hours.

Swift Title Loans stands out for the personalized service noted across multiple customer reviews. A single loan officer, Alfred, is named in nearly every review as the primary point of contact — consistently described as patient, honest about terms, and thorough in explaining the paperwork. The branch environment is described as clean and welcoming. The extended weekday hours and Saturday availability are practical advantages over lenders who operate standard business hours only.

The most significant concern is the complete absence of disclosed APRs, fees, and loan term lengths on the website. Title loans frequently carry triple-digit annual percentage rates, and without disclosed numbers, consumers cannot make an informed comparison. Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default on a title loan — a risk not mentioned on the site. Customer reviews request basic features that are missing: a mobile payment app, text reminders for upcoming payments, and additional repayment plan options. The domain mismatch (an LA-branded URL for a Memphis lender) may also cause initial trust hesitation.
pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Accepts borrowers with bad credit and past bankruptcies explicitly
Upper loan tier extends to $50,000, well above typical emergency lenders
Borrower retains use of their vehicle throughout the loan term
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Online application process available alongside in-person service
Loan officer Alfred consistently praised across reviews for patience and plain-language explanations
cons: No APRs, fees, or loan term lengths disclosed anywhere on the website
Vehicle can be repossessed if the borrower defaults — a material risk not disclosed on the site
No mobile app, text payment reminders, or digital account management
Single Memphis location with no other branches listed
Domain name (cartitleloansla.com) does not match Tennessee branding, creating confusion
best_for: Memphis-area residents who own a vehicle outright and need cash the same day
Borrowers with bad credit or bankruptcy history who cannot qualify for a personal loan
Consumers who need more than a payday loan but want to use their car as collateral
Borrowers comfortable with in-person service and extended weekday hours
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents who own a vehicle free and clear, need fast cash, and have been rejected elsewhere due to bad credit or bankruptcy. The main caveat is serious: the website discloses no APRs, fees, or repayment terms, so borrowers must request a full loan agreement before signing — title loans frequently carry triple-digit APRs and carry vehicle repossession risk on default.
services: In-person loan processing at Memphis branch
